speaker: Alice
text: I just moved to Shanghai last week for a new job at a tech startup.

speaker: Bob
text: That's exciting! Which area of Shanghai are you living in?

speaker: Alice
text: I'm in Pudong, near Zhangjiang Hi-Tech Park. The company is called DataFlow AI.

speaker: Bob
text: Oh, I've heard of DataFlow AI! They work on natural language processing, right?

speaker: Alice
text: Yes, exactly. I'm joining the memory systems team. We're building long-term memory for AI agents.

speaker: Alice
text: I visited the Bund yesterday evening. The skyline was absolutely stunning!

speaker: Bob
text: The Bund is beautiful at night. Did you go to any restaurants there?

speaker: Alice
text: Yes, I tried a place called 'Old Shanghai' - amazing xiaolongbao! I'm definitely going back.

speaker: Bob
text: How is your work at DataFlow AI going? Still enjoying the memory systems team?

speaker: Alice
text: It's great! We just finished a prototype for cross-session entity merging. My colleague Li Wei helped a lot with the graph algorithms.
